title: DJ

sections.heading: WHAT YOU'LL NEED TO PLAY
sections.middleText1:
two single or multi-message switches
record:
"next" on one switch 
"add to list" on the other
sections.middleText2: music-streaming service to create a playlist that can be saved

sections.heading: HOW TO PLAY
sections.body:
1.  The switch user creates their own playlist for any occasion.
2.  Play a song or say an artist’s name.
3.  If they choose "next", move to a new song or artist.
4.  If they choose "add to the list", add the current song or artist to the playlist.

tooltipText: Use 2 switches to scan through different songs and create a custom playlist
